result:
All 30 tests pass. Here's what was added to `Main.java`:

- **`status`** — reads the index and prints staged files (or `(none)`)
- **`diff <c1> <c2>`** — parses both commits' file maps and reports Added/Removed/Modified
- **`checkout <hash>`** — restores working files from blobs, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset <hash>`** — updates HEAD and clears index without touching working files
- **`rm <file>`** — removes a file from the index (exits 1 if not present)
- **`show <hash>`** — prints commit metadata and files with 2-space indent

The existing `parseCommit` was split into `parseCommitHeaders` (header fields) and the new `parseCommitFiles` (files section) to support the new commands cleanly.
